task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

Delete earlier-started project and then delete inbox file

function.message: I can’t safely complete this as written because there is no canonical project record (or start date) for “sailboat refit notebook.” I found it only as an idea in a knowledge note, while Studio Parts Library is a real project (folder date 2026_04_28). Please clarify what canonical record should represent the sailboat item, or confirm you want me to compare Studio Parts Library against that note and then specify what should be deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Performed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system workflow before task work, treated inbox as non-canonical, and avoided workspace mutation because required canonical fact is missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION: the request requires comparing project start dates and deleting whichever started first, but evidence shows only one canonical project record exists (40_projects/2026_04_28_studio_parts_library/README.MD). “Sailboat refit notebook” appears only in 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md as a fantasy idea and has no canonical project folder/README or start date to compare.
